cases.prompt: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley city or its immediate unincorporated vicinity with existing residential dwellings classified as low quality, and parcel size between 1 and 3 acres.

failures.message: R2SearchError: The query must read from allowed R2 parquet files with read_parquet().

action_plan: Fix the SQL-generation guardrail or schema contract named in the failure before rerunning the eval.
cases.next_action: Fix the SQL-generation guardrail or schema contract named in the failure before rerunning the eval.

cases.prompt: lots in sedro-woolley or marblemount that are over 1 acre with utilities and no improvements.
action_plan: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.next_action: No action needed. Keep this case in the regression suite.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number AS parcel_number, ps.acres, ps.city_name, ps.situs_city_state_zip, TRIM(a."Utilities") AS utilities, ps.improvement_building_count
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') ps
JOIN read_parquet('r2://openskagit/assessor.parquet') a ON ps.parcel_number = TRIM(a."Parcel Number")
WHERE ps.acres > 1
  AND (LOWER(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR LOWER(ps.city_name) = 'marblemount' OR LOWER(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%' OR LOWER(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%marblemount%')
  AND TRIM(COALESCE(a."Utilities", '')) <> ''
  AND ps.improvement_building_count = 0
cases.title: Lots in Sedro-Woolley or Marblemount Over 1 Acre with Utilities and No Improvements
cases.criteria_summary: Parcels located in Sedro-Woolley or Marblemount, with acreage greater than 1, having utilities present, and no improvements on the parcel.

action_plan: The query returned more rows than the eval allows. Either add a deterministic LIMIT/order for this case or raise expected_max_result_count if the broader result set is acceptable.
cases.next_action: The query returned more rows than the eval allows. Either add a deterministic LIMIT/order for this case or raise expected_max_result_count if the broader result set is acceptable.
cases.generated_sql:
SELECT ps.parcel_number
FROM read_parquet('r2://openskagit/derived/parcel_search.parquet') AS ps
WHERE (lower(ps.city_name) = 'sedro-woolley' OR lower(ps.situs_city_state_zip) LIKE '%sedro-woolley%')
  AND ps.acres > 0
  AND ps.has_geometry = TRUE
  AND ps.land_use IS NOT NULL
  AND (regexp_extract(ps.land_use, '^\((\d+)\)', 1) IN ('190', '910', '911', '940', '941'))
  AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%MH LEASED%'
  AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%CONDOMINIUM%'
  AND ps.land_use NOT LIKE '%PUBLIC%'
  AND ps.improvement_building_count = 0
cases.title: Recreation Lots in Sedro-Woolley
cases.criteria_summary: Select parcels in Sedro-Woolley city or situs city state zip containing 'sedro-woolley' that are recreational or undeveloped land, excluding mobile home leased properties, condominiums, public/civic/open-space parcels, zero-acre or no-geometry parcels, and parcels with residential dwelling evidence.
